key_themes: High sustainable dividend yield (~7%) with consistent growth and safe cash-flow payout
Major capital investments ($5–5.5B) in natural gas infrastructure tied to AI/data center demand
Strong analyst consensus with Buy ratings and average price target of ~$21.60 (15%+ upside)
Solid YTD performance near highs with improving fundamentals in midstream energy
summary: Sentiment for Energy Transfer (ET) is strongly positive in mid-April 2026. The company raised its 2026 EBITDA guidance, announced substantial growth spending on natural gas projects linked to AI/data center power needs, and continues to deliver an attractive ~7% yield backed by stable cash flows. Analysts are overwhelmingly bullish with repeated Buy initiations and upward price target revisions, while the units have posted double-digit YTD gains and trade with further upside to consensus targets around $21.60.
sources: 20+ recent news articles and analyst reports (Yahoo Finance, Motley Fool, TipRanks, Simply Wall St), 10+ relevant X posts (primarily positive dividend/growth focused)
